'''Darth Vader's Palace''', also referred to as '''Darth Vader's castle''', was a massive building located within the [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Imperial Center]], also known as Coruscant. It served as the public abode of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] and the [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]]. [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader's palace was in the same category of height as [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] and [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] [[Xizor's Palace|Palace]], though the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor's]] remained the largest of the three monoliths. All three residences were within walking distance of each other accessed through the highly protected corridors.

==Description==
While Prince [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] and [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Palpatine relished their abodes with many treasures and luxurious artifacts, the interior of [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Vader's Palace was much less glamorous. Despite the vast wealth and resources at his disposal as Supreme Commander,<ref name="kenner">{{KennerCite|set=Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (toy line)|pack=Darth Vader vs. Prince Xizor|link=soteKxizor-vader.asp}}</ref> he displayed no riches or decorations, not even holo-framed pictures on the walls; most of the furnishings were simple [[Greel wood/Legends|greel wood]] structures. The Palace also housed a [[Darth Vader's meditation chamber/Legends|hyperbaric chamber]] similar to the one aboard his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], where Vader would frequently meditate and cultivate the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] in an attempt to heal his damaged lungs temporarily. The Dark Lord would also often spar against combat [[Droid/Legends|droids]] to keep his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] skills sharp.

Despite the minimalism of its resident, the Palace did contain a high level of security; surveillance and spy systems were used to analyze all conversations held within and even monitor facial movements and gestures. These were all monitored by body language experts housed within the Palace security offices. Often Xizor would monitor Vader's activities at the Palace using spies, and he always knew when the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] was within or away from his Coruscanti residence.

Vader's private quarters were located deep within the castle, behind blast doors and other security features. A small command center was close at hand, through which Vader could keep in touch with the rest of the galaxy. The castle also held the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] training chambers, a combat arena in which he could practice [[Darth Vader's lightsaber/Legends|his lightsaber]] combat skills against modified [[ASP-19 battle droid/Legends|ASP-19 battle droids]], and a docking bay for his personal transport, the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] [[ST 321/Legends|ST 321]].

The workers in the landing bay at the Palace were trained to get Vader's private shuttle ready as quickly as possible, usually within the time it took for the Dark Lord of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] to use the [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolift]] to the landing bay floor. There was one account of a time when the Supreme Commander arrived and the shuttle was not ready in which he promptly executed those responsible. Ever since, preparations for Vader's shuttle were always punctual.

The Palace was not Vader's only residence on Coruscant; he also had a [[Darth Vader's Coruscant fortress retreat|fortress retreat]] on the planet's northern hemisphere, on the shoreline of the [[Great Western Sea/Legends|Western Sea]]. In addition to those, he also had a private citadel on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] known as [[Bast Castle]].

==History==
The structure was built under the orders of Vader's [[Sith Master/Legends|master]], Palpatine, after the construction and expansion of the Imperial Palace was completed.

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Vader met with Imperial spy [[Wrenga Jixton|Jix]] and his [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguard [[Kohvrekhar]] here.
